data.content: I need to upgrade MSTest to v4 for `ThrowsExactly` support and add a missing `using System;`:

arguments.old_str:
<ItemGroup>
    <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.11.1" />
    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestAdapter" Version="3.6.3" />
    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestFramework" Version="3.6.3" />
  </ItemGroup>

data.reasoningText:
Two issues:
1. `ThrowsExactly` doesn't exist in MSTest 3.6.3 - it was introduced in MSTest v4. I need to use `Assert.ThrowsException` instead, or upgrade MSTest.
2. Missing `using System;` for `ArgumentOutOfRangeException`.

Wait, the user specifically asked for `Assert.ThrowsExactly`. Let me check what version of MSTest has `ThrowsExactly`. It was introduced in MSTest 3.6.0 actually... Let me check. Actually, `ThrowsExactly` was introduced in MSTest v4 (4.0.0-preview). In MSTest 3.x it's `Assert.ThrowsException<T>`.


Looking at the MSTest changelog, `ThrowsExactly` was added in MSTest v3.7.0, so I need to upgrade the MSTest packages to use it. So `ThrowsExactly` is an MSTest v4 feature. I need to upgrade the packages to version 4.x and add the missing `using System;` directive since implicit usings aren't enabled. I should also verify that the generic `IsInstanceOfType<T>` method is available in that version.

    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestAdapter" Version="3.6.3" />
    <PackageReference Include="MSTest.TestFramework" Version="3.6.3" />
  </ItemGroup>

data.content:
All 5 tests pass. Here's a summary of the modernizations applied:

| Anti-pattern | Fix |
|---|---|
| `public class` | → `public sealed class` |
| `TestContext?` (nullable) | → `TestContext = null!` |
| `[TestInitialize]` for sync setup | → field initializer `new()` |
| Vague name `Test1` | → descriptive `CalculateTotal_WithValidInputs_ReturnsSubtotalPlusTax` |
| Swapped `Assert.AreEqual` args | → `(expected, actual)` order |
| `[ExpectedException]` | → `Assert.ThrowsExactly<T>()` |
| Hard cast + `Assert.IsTrue` | → `Assert.IsInstanceOfType<T>()` + `StringAssert.Contains` |
| Manual loop with `object[]` | → `[DataRow]` parameterized test |
| Old split packages | → unified `MSTest` 3.8.2 meta-package |
